title: erythroxylum microphyllum
intro: Erythroxylum microphyllum is a plant species in the family Erythroxylaceae, commonly known as the small-leaf coca plant. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea. The health benefits of Erythroxylum microphyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of altitude sickness. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in traditional medicine, and it is also used as a natural remedy in some cultures to aid in digestion and boost energy.
